session.user: Run `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command to analyze the objective view command file and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check ruff linting for objective view command

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (105 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py:203:101 | 201 | if objective_id is None: 202 | raise UserFacingCliError( 203 | f"No objective reference provided and branch '{branch}' is not linked to an objective.\n" | ^^^^^ 204 | "Usage: erk objective view <objective_ref>" 205 | ) |
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
**ruff check failed: 1 error found**
**Location and Details:** - File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py` - Line: 203 - Column: 101 - Rule: E501 (Line too long) - Message: Line too long (105 > 100 characters)
The error is on line 203 where an f-string exceeds the 100-character line length limit by 5 characters.
